## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration on content creation and community development for GrowthX.ai's AI and growth-focused platform.](https://fathom.video/share/VZQGufkGTL-mSTAyqdstJ2FYv9xxoxoT?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX.ai seeks to enhance their content offering and community engagement on their Circle-hosted platform](https://fathom.video/share/VZQGufkGTL-mSTAyqdstJ2FYv9xxoxoT?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Current content focuses on AI-driven growth strategies, with potential to expand into more detailed guides and courses](https://fathom.video/share/VZQGufkGTL-mSTAyqdstJ2FYv9xxoxoT?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [David DeLallo to propose a content strategy and potential ongoing engagement structure](https://fathom.video/share/VZQGufkGTL-mSTAyqdstJ2FYv9xxoxoT?tab=summary&timestamp=1257.0)
  - [Possibility of a broader role in community management and content strategy discussed](https://fathom.video/share/VZQGufkGTL-mSTAyqdstJ2FYv9xxoxoT?tab=summary&timestamp=1257.0)

## Topics

### Current Platform and Content Overview

  - [Hosted on Circle, a community platform with paywall capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/VZQGufkGTL-mSTAyqdstJ2FYv9xxoxoT?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [Content types: courses, workshops, write-ups, frameworks, podcasts](https://fathom.video/share/VZQGufkGTL-mSTAyqdstJ2FYv9xxoxoT?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [37 paying members, with more accessing free content](https://fathom.video/share/VZQGufkGTL-mSTAyqdstJ2FYv9xxoxoT?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
  - [Main audience: CMOs and decision-makers in growth and marketing](https://fathom.video/share/VZQGufkGTL-mSTAyqdstJ2FYv9xxoxoT?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)

### Content Expansion Ideas

  - [Develop more in-depth guides from existing workshop content](https://fathom.video/share/VZQGufkGTL-mSTAyqdstJ2FYv9xxoxoT?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [Create detailed courses on AI fundamentals for marketers](https://fathom.video/share/VZQGufkGTL-mSTAyqdstJ2FYv9xxoxoT?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
  - [Produce use-case specific content (e.g., integration guides, PRDs)](https://fathom.video/share/VZQGufkGTL-mSTAyqdstJ2FYv9xxoxoT?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Develop content on optimizing for LLM search and citations](https://fathom.video/share/VZQGufkGTL-mSTAyqdstJ2FYv9xxoxoT?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Consider adding community engagement features (e.g., Q\&A threads)](https://fathom.video/share/VZQGufkGTL-mSTAyqdstJ2FYv9xxoxoT?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)

### Collaboration Structure

  - [David to provide a proposal for initial engagement](https://fathom.video/share/VZQGufkGTL-mSTAyqdstJ2FYv9xxoxoT?tab=summary&timestamp=1257.0)
  - [Potential for a month-long test project to prove concept](https://fathom.video/share/VZQGufkGTL-mSTAyqdstJ2FYv9xxoxoT?tab=summary&timestamp=1908.0)
  - [Focus on expanding existing content and creating new materials](https://fathom.video/share/VZQGufkGTL-mSTAyqdstJ2FYv9xxoxoT?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [Possibility of ongoing monthly engagement with defined deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/VZQGufkGTL-mSTAyqdstJ2FYv9xxoxoT?tab=summary&timestamp=1900.0)

### Community Growth Strategy

  - [Goal to grow to a few thousand members](https://fathom.video/share/VZQGufkGTL-mSTAyqdstJ2FYv9xxoxoT?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)
  - [Plan to seed community with notable founding members](https://fathom.video/share/VZQGufkGTL-mSTAyqdstJ2FYv9xxoxoT?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
  - [Aim to make the community the core of GrowthX.ai's marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/VZQGufkGTL-mSTAyqdstJ2FYv9xxoxoT?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

### Potential Full-Time Opportunity

  - [Discussion of a possible role managing the community and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/VZQGufkGTL-mSTAyqdstJ2FYv9xxoxoT?tab=summary&timestamp=2146.0)
  - [Compensation expectations discussed (David's current earnings \~$225k, initial offer was $150k)](https://fathom.video/share/VZQGufkGTL-mSTAyqdstJ2FYv9xxoxoT?tab=summary&timestamp=2180.0)
  - [Jason open to further discussions pending successful initial collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/VZQGufkGTL-mSTAyqdstJ2FYv9xxoxoT?tab=summary&timestamp=2256.0)

## Next Steps

  - [David to explore the Circle platform and current content](https://fathom.video/share/VZQGufkGTL-mSTAyqdstJ2FYv9xxoxoT?tab=summary&timestamp=1257.0)
  - [David to draft and submit a proposal within a week](https://fathom.video/share/VZQGufkGTL-mSTAyqdstJ2FYv9xxoxoT?tab=summary&timestamp=1257.0)
  - [Jason to consider sharing additional context if needed](https://fathom.video/share/VZQGufkGTL-mSTAyqdstJ2FYv9xxoxoT?tab=summary&timestamp=2292.0)
  - [Both parties to reassess potential for broader engagement after initial project](https://fathom.video/share/VZQGufkGTL-mSTAyqdstJ2FYv9xxoxoT?tab=summary&timestamp=2307.0)
